'''vodhafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stabilometric|stabilometric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stabilometric|stabilometric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| vodhafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodhafithi|vodhafithi]] || [[word:vodhafiji|vodhafiji]] || [[word:vodhafishi|vodhafishi]] || [[word:vodhafiki|vodhafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodhafuthuthu|vodhafuthuthu]] || [[word:vodhafujuju|vodhafujuju]] || [[word:vodhafushushu|vodhafushushu]] || [[word:vodhafukuku|vodhafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodhafuthu|vodhafuthu]] || [[word:vodhafuju|vodhafuju]] || [[word:vodhafushu|vodhafushu]] || [[word:vodhafuku|vodhafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodhafufthuf|vodhafufthuf]] || [[word:vodhafufjuf|vodhafufjuf]] || [[word:vodhafufshuf|vodhafufshuf]] || [[word:vodhafufkuf|vodhafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodhafethe|vodhafethe]] || [[word:vodhafeje|vodhafeje]] || [[word:vodhafeshe|vodhafeshe]] || [[word:vodhafeke|vodhafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodhafothotho|vodhafothotho]] || [[word:vodhafojojo|vodhafojojo]] || [[word:vodhafoshosho|vodhafoshosho]] || [[word:vodhafokoko|vodhafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodhafotho|vodhafotho]] || [[word:vodhafojo|vodhafojo]] || [[word:vodhafosho|vodhafosho]] || [[word:vodhafoko|vodhafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodhafofthof|vodhafofthof]] || [[word:vodhafofjof|vodhafofjof]] || [[word:vodhafofshof|vodhafofshof]] || [[word:vodhafofkof|vodhafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodhafïfthïf|vodhafïfthïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfjïf|vodhafïfjïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfshïf|vodhafïfshïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfkïf|vodhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodhafïfthïfthïf|vodhafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfjïfjïf|vodhafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfshïfshïf|vodhafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfkïfkïf|vodhafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodhafïfthïf|vodhafïfthïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfjïf|vodhafïfjïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfshïf|vodhafïfshïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfkïf|vodhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodhafïfthïf|vodhafïfthïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfjïf|vodhafïfjïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfshïf|vodhafïfshïf]] || [[word:vodhafïfkïf|vodhafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vodhafæthæ|vodhafæthæ]] || [[word:vodhafæjæ|vodhafæjæ]] || [[word:vodhafæshæ|vodhafæshæ]] || [[word:vodhafækæ|vodhafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vodhafathatha|vodhafathatha]] || [[word:vodhafajaja|vodhafajaja]] || [[word:vodhafashasha|vodhafashasha]] || [[word:vodhafakaka|vodhafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vodhafatha|vodhafatha]] || [[word:vodhafaja|vodhafaja]] || [[word:vodhafasha|vodhafasha]] || [[word:vodhafaka|vodhafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vodhafafthaf|vodhafafthaf]] || [[word:vodhafafjaf|vodhafafjaf]] || [[word:vodhafafshaf|vodhafafshaf]] || [[word:vodhafafkaf|vodhafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:vodhafasha|vodhafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodhafshësha|vodhafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodhafrosha|vodhafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodhafmusha|vodhafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodhafyasha|vodhafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodhafnkshësha|govodhafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodhafnkrosha|govodhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodhafnkmusha|govodhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodhafnkyasha|govodhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:vodhadhafasha|vodhadhafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodhadhafshësha|vodhadhafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodhadhafrosha|vodhadhafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodhadhafmusha|vodhadhafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodhadhafyasha|vodhadhafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodhadhafnkshësha|govodhadhafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodhadhafnkrosha|govodhadhafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodhadhafnkmusha|govodhadhafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodhadhafnkyasha|govodhadhafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:vedhæfasha|vedhæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vedhæfshësha|vedhæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vedhæfrosha|vedhæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vedhæfmusha|vedhæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vedhæfyasha|vedhæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govedhæfnkshësha|govedhæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govedhæfnkrosha|govedhæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govedhæfnkmusha|govedhæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govedhæfnkyasha|govedhæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:vodhfafasha|vodhfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:vodhfafshësha|vodhfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vodhfafrosha|vodhfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vodhfafmusha|vodhfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vodhfafyasha|vodhfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govodhfafnkshësha|govodhfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govodhfafnkrosha|govodhfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govodhfafnkmusha|govodhfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govodhfafnkyasha|govodhfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
